prices.source_block:
Please print and present receipt for this ticket at the museum.

Griffin Members – FREE admission
NARM Members – FREE admission
General Admission – $12
Seniors (65+) – $8
Children 12 and under – FREE
Students of member academic institutions with student ID – FREE
Thursdays 2 to 4 – FREE admission for all
Card to Culture holders of a ConnectorCare, WIC or EBT card are admitted free of charge.

hours.source_phrase: Note the Griffin Museum is currently open Tues-Sun Noon-4PM.
hours.source_block: Note the Griffin Museum is currently open Tues-Sun Noon-4PM. We occasionally close for an event, really bad weather, or to hang the next show. If that is the case we post that information in a banner at the top of our site. View levels and benefits of membership.
